entries.title: Spaarti Cloning Requires Thrawn/Dark Empire Context

content.fact: Spaarti cloning technology is highly context-sensitive and should not appear as generic public cloning.
content.injection: Use Spaarti cloning for Thrawn/Mount Tantiss or other explicit Legends contexts, not casual medical cloning.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Thrawn Campaign.
Respect story-position bounds from Thrawn Returns to Thrawn Defeated.
antiLore: Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.

entries.title: Katana Fleet Is Old but Valuable Fleet Resource

content.fact: The Katana Fleet consists of lost Dreadnaughts whose value is strategic numbers, not modern superiority.
content.injection: Treat the Katana Fleet as a massive force multiplier with aging ships and political urgency. Do not import later-era status, relationships, factions, or outcomes into this window.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Katana Fleet Race.
Respect story-position bounds from Katana Fleet Race to Katana Fleet Race.

entries.title: Sun Crusher Should Not Leak Before Academy Era

content.fact: The Sun Crusher is Jedi Academy-era superweapon material and should not leak into Thrawn or early post-Endor scenes.
content.injection: Before the Jedi Academy era, block casual knowledge or use of the Sun Crusher unless the story explicitly imports it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Early New Republic.
Respect story-position bounds from Endor Aftermath to Han and Leia Married.
antiLore: Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.

entries.title: World Devastators Are Dark Empire Context

content.fact: World Devastators belong to Dark Empire and should not be generic Imperial hardware.
content.injection: In Dark Empire crisis, only inject World Devastator lore in Dark Empire or later contexts that explicitly reference them.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Dark Empire crisis.

entries.title: Eclipse Is Not a Normal Star Destroyer

content.fact: The Eclipse is a unique terror-dreadnought associated with the reborn Emperor, not a standard Remnant ship.
content.injection: Do not casually assign Eclipse-class assets to ordinary Imperial warlords without Dark Empire context. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Dark Empire crisis.
Respect story-position bounds from Dark Empire Crisis Begins to Palpatine Clone Threat Defeated.
antiLore: Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.

content.fact: Bacta remains a strategic healing resource during New Republic military and political crises.
content.injection: When medical recovery matters, bacta access can create leverage, shortages, and political stakes. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.

entries.title: Lightsabers Remain Rare in New Republic Era

context.label: Post-Endor New Republic before the New Jedi Order
context.phase: Early New Republic to New Jedi Order Threshold

content.fact: Before Luke’s restored Jedi Order matures, lightsabers remain rare and symbolically loaded.
content.injection: Do not treat every Force-sensitive character as having a polished lightsaber unless training and construction context supports it. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Post-Endor New Republic before the New Jedi Order.

entries.title: Holocrons Are Recovered Lore, Not Public Manuals

context.label: Jedi Academy founding era
context.phase: Jedi Academy Era to Mid New Republic

content.fact: Holocrons and Jedi records are scarce, dangerous, and context-dependent sources of recovered knowledge.
content.injection: Use holocrons as rare lore objects with interpretation risk, not easy public databases. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Jedi Academy founding era.
Respect story-position bounds from Luke Founds the Jedi Academy to Jedi Praxeum Stabilizes.

context.phase: Early New Republic to New Jedi Order Threshold

content.fact: The New Republic era contains multiple Legends superweapon crises, but they should not all be active in the same ordinary scene.
content.injection: Use only the superweapon relevant to the current Context; avoid stacking Death Star, Sun Crusher, World Devastator, Darksaber, and Eclipse threats without explicit premise. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Post-Endor New Republic before the New Jedi Order.
